subcodes.first_line: A thousand years must elapse before Persia can, by the aid of material power, rise to the height of the peoples and governments of Europe.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایران بقوای مادیه هزار سال میخواهد که مانند دول و ملل اورپ گردد ولی
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @growth of the Cause, @praise of Western values; culture, @critique of Eastern values; culture
